functions.name: getBubbleVolumeSize
functions.description: Calculates volumetric dimensions for home bubble nodes based on active notifications. Integrates a log-exponential distribution formula to normalize visual scaling bounds.

functions.name: addCustomApp
functions.description: Registers a dynamic, user-configured integration app bubble. Saves the credentials (API key, custom endpoint url) to the local model registry.

functions.name: sendMail
functions.description: Spawns a custom work or personal email message payload, pre-pends it to the in-memory array, increments the Mail system notification ticker, and commits to cache.

functions.name: markMailAsRead
functions.description: Locates an active email item by ID, toggles its unread indicator, decrements the workspace notification count, and triggers subscribers.

functions.name: archiveMail
functions.description: Toggles the archived boolean on a selected email to filter it out from mailboxes grids.

functions.name: deleteMediaItem
functions.description: Excludes a multimedia asset from the active collection to permanent delete.

functions.name: migrateMediaSource
functions.description: Toggles item host source flags between 'google-photos' (cloud) and 'local' storage to simulate media transfers.

functions.name: setMediaGroup
functions.description: Updates tag structures of media assets to register them within custom bento dashboard categories.

functions.name: sendChat
functions.description: Appends a participant response string into Slack or WhatsApp conversational histories.

functions.name: addNote
functions.description: Creates an empty note template, updates timestamp strings, and returns index models.

functions.name: updateNote
functions.description: Sets text and subject descriptors on notes, updates timezone tracking data, and saves state.

functions.name: deleteNote
functions.description: Removes a text document from the store list of user scratchpads.

functions.name: addCalendarEvent
functions.description: Schedules a custom event onto target monthly calendars with metadata (time hours, category, durations).

functions.name: useMailController
functions.description: React controller hook exposing list state tracking, filters, selection, and composition state variables.

functions.name: useMediaController
functions.description: React controller hook triggering progressive-timer intervals and states to animate simulated media file transfers.

functions.name: useMessagingController
functions.description: React controller hook exposing chat threads, active chat selectors, and generating auto-replies.

functions.name: useGithubController
functions.description: React controller hook listing active commits, filtering status cards, and keeping list indexes.

functions.name: useDashboardController
functions.description: React controller hook computing timeframe filters and adjusting mock visual graphs of databases.

functions.name: useNotesController
functions.description: React controller hook syncing text content with store states on-keypress for reliable edit-saving.

functions.name: useCalendarController
functions.description: React controller hook outputting month sizes, leap grids, and highlighted event lists.
